chunks.title: Dining with a Ruler
chunks.reason: Advice on managing appetite and expectations when eating with a wealthy host.

chunks.title: Fool, Orphans, and Discipline
chunks.reason: Three distinct instructions regarding speech to a fool, property boundaries for orphans, and child discipline.

chunks.title: Wisdom and Parental Joy
chunks.reason: A continuous address from a father to his son covering wisdom, hope, wine, parents, and the danger of a harlot.

chunks.title: The Woes of Wine
chunks.reason: A rhetorical description of the effects of heavy drinking culminating in a first-person dialogue of the drunkard.
